treatment.reported_injury: Soft-tissue neck strain from a rear-end auto collision

treatment_injury_mismatch.note: Lumbar MRI billed for a reported cervical (neck) injury; no documented lower-back complaint

unsupported_procedure.note: Imaging order does not reference the lumbar study; procedure appears unsupported by the chart

narrative: Claimant reports neck strain following a rear-end collision and submits billing for ER evaluation, cervical and lumbar imaging, and physical therapy. Billed total exceeds the provider's own estimate.
